seoTitle: Henderson County Public Schools Calendar 2027-2028 | Holidays, Breaks & PDF
seoDescription: View Henderson County Public Schools NC calendar 2027-2028. Find first day of school, holidays, winter break, spring break, PDF and downloadable calendar files.
calendarNotes: Henderson County Public Schools starts the 2027-2028 Traditional/HCEC school year on August 12, 2027 and ends on May 26, 2028 with early dismissal. Winter Break runs December 20-January 2, and Spring Break runs March 13-17. The calendar also lists optional and required teacher workdays, holidays, annual leave, early dismissal, and inclement-weather notes. A separate Flex calendar is available from the district.

calendarFaqs.q: When does Henderson County Public Schools start school in 2027?
calendarFaqs.a: The first day of school is Thursday, August 12, 2027.

calendarFaqs.q: When is Henderson County Public Schools Spring Break in 2028?
calendarFaqs.a: Spring Break runs Monday, March 13 through Friday, March 17, 2028.

calendarFaqs.q: When is the last day of school for Henderson County Public Schools in 2028?
calendarFaqs.a: The last day of school is Friday, May 26, 2028, with early dismissal.

calendarFaqs.q: Does HCPS have a Flex calendar for 2027-2028?
calendarFaqs.a: Yes. The district publishes a separate 2027-2028 Flex calendar linked as an alternate calendar.

yearNumbers.label: First Day
yearNumbers.detail: The first day of school is August 12, 2027.

yearNumbers.label: Last Day
yearNumbers.detail: The last day of school is May 26, 2028.
